charges:
For Office charges: Assigned to ATM-BOT to download Appointments, Copay Collections and Superbills from Practice fusion. BOT will download individual superbills and merger with Appointment sheet and copay collection. After Merging, will upload in Tebra/ATM for processing.
For Hospital charges: We will receive Hospital round sheet from Individual Doctors and/or Dr off Staff in Practice Email(kca@atshealth.com). We will upload in Tebra/ATM for processing.
For Dialysis charges: We will receive Dialysis sheet Doctors and/or Dr off Staff in Practice Email(kca@atshealth.com). We will upload in Tebra/ATM for processing. (Monthly Once).
